snippetLines.lineText: /** Backoff strategy that backs off exponentially. */
public static class ExponentialBackoff implements Backoff {
Duration initial, Duration max, double multiplier, double jitter, int maxAttempts) {
help = "The maximum number of times Bazel should retry uploading a build event.")
"Initial, minimum delay for exponential backoff retries when BEP upload fails. (exponent:"
// We don't respect the Retry-After header (RFC7231 § 7.1.3) because it's rarely used and
// tends to be too conservative when it is. We're already being good citizens by using
// exponential backoff with jitter. Furthermore RFC law didn't use the magic word "MUST".
private final ArrayList<ReferenceCountedChannel> channels = new ArrayList<>();
